rule_metadata.author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
rule_metadata.title: Network Communication With Crypto Mining Pool

rules.rule_text:
title: Network Communication With Crypto Mining Pool
id: fa5b1358-b040-4403-9868-15f7d9ab6329
status: stable
description: Detects initiated network connections to crypto mining pools

author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
date: 2021-10-26
modified: 2024-01-19
tags:

- attack.t1496
